title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You've caught so many! There was hope for us
after all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm amazed! You know, looking at these plushies
really makes me think...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: In the next race, I... I just might make it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll give it my all! N-no one will outshine me!
